productDisplayName: Franco Leone Men Casual Black Sandals
description: Cast a timeless impression in comfort with this pair of franco leone leather slippers. Give your casual wear a twist of fashion with this pair of slippers and leave behind your style statement wherever you go.UpperSoft and wide midfoot black leather strap in a cross-over pattern for absolute style and to hold the foot in placeBrown leather footbed ergonomically padded for all-day comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with strategically placed textured lugs to offer absolute grip on various surfacesshoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shoe shineDo not store in direct sunlight
